name.message: Telegram Sender - TG bulk message send

desc.message: Pobierz członków grupy Telegram i wyślij wiadomość masową, zaproś członków masowo automatycznie na TG.Scrape group members and send bulk message, invite bulk members automatically on TG

scraper_question.message: How to Scrape Telegram Group Members?

scraper_step_2.message: 2. Click on the group(not channel) that you want to scrape

scraper_step_3.message: 3. Set the number of usernames you want to scrape

scraper_step_5.message: 5. After finish, usernames will be shown below

scraper_contact.message: If you have any question, contact us:

scraper_tip.message: Choose a group to begin using this feature

message_step_2.message: 2. Input a list of Telegram username or phone number to send message (use Scraper feature to scrape usernames)

message_step_3.message: 3. Set the message that you want to send

message_step_4.message: 4. Set the interval between messages. (20 to 25 seconds is recommended)

message_placeholder.message: Paste username list or phone number list that should be messaged

invite_question.message: How to Invite Bulk Members in Group?

invite_step_2.message: 2. Click on the group that you want to add members

invite_step_3.message: 3. Input a list of Telegram username

invite_step_4.message: 4. Set the interval between invites (20 to 25 seconds is recommened)

invite_placeholder.message: Paste list usernames that should be invited

progress_tip.message: Please stay on this window until complete

progress_complete_other.message: Complete! (group has insufficient or hidden members)

popup_title.message: To avoid your account being banned, we suggest:

popup_title_1.message: To avoid sending failed, we suggest:

popup_tip_4.message: Stay on this window while messages are sending automatically.

api_verify_tip1.message: Phone number must begin with +. like +86,+01.

api_verify_tip2.message: Telegram will send a code to the Telegram Web or App on your other device.

api_verify_tip3.message: We don't collect your Telegram private data.

api_login_tip_1.message: Telegram will send a code to the Telegram Web or App on your other device.

api_login_tip_2.message: If you don't received any code, please check your phone number.

api_verify_tip.message: You Need to Verify to Use API Scraper!

api_group_placeholder.message: enter a group link, like https://t.me/name
